## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.16.1

### 🎥 Cameras
- Repairs the Camera Sleep control so it follows the APK flow: write the dormancy setting, then refresh camera data instead of inventing local camera status.
- Keeps the existing camera sleep state and wake action available for supported cameras.

### 🎥 Recordings
- Adds a guard so SD recording capture cannot open a separate X-Sense WebRTC relay while the same camera is already serving a live WebRTC view.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for Camera Sleep, live WebRTC session tracking, recording-capture guarding, camera API behavior, and WebRTC signaling.
